title: Juicy Drop Blasts – Sour Chewy Candy Filled with Liquid Centre - Bzk (250g)
features: Juicy Drop Blasts – Sour Chewy Candy Filled with Liquid Centre - Bzk
Sour chewy candy with a tangy liquid-filled centre
Bold mix of sweet and sour flavours in every bite
Fun and exciting treat for kids and sour candy lovers
Perfect for parties, sharing, or on-the-go snacking
description: Product description Juicy Drop Blasts – Sour Chewy Candy Filled with Liquid Centre - Bzk. Get ready for an exciting burst of flavour with Juicy Drop Blasts – chewy sour candies with a tangy liquid centre. Each bite delivers a perfect balance of sweet and sour, making them a fun and bold treat for kids and candy lovers alike. Great for sharing, party bags, or enjoying on the go, these sweets pack a flavour punch in every piece. Ingredients Sugar, glucose syrup, fully hydrogenated vegetable fat (palm), acidity regulators (citric acid, E500ii), flavourings (apple, strawberry, lemon, cola, raspberry, watermelon) colours (E162, E150a, E163, E100, E141, E133), humectant (sorbitol), beef gelatine, emulsifiers (mono and di-glycerides of fatty acids, soya lecithin), Salt. Allergens (if any). Directions Suitable for kids. Each serving is 250g, with 5 servings per container. See more
